configurations.name: skmagic-node
runtimeArgs: const http=require('http'),fs=require('fs'),path=require('path'),root=process.cwd(),web=path.join(root,'web');const m={'.html':'text/html;charset=utf-8','.js':'text/javascript;charset=utf-8','.css':'text/css;charset=utf-8','.json':'application/json;charset=utf-8','.png':'image/png','.jpg':'image/jpeg','.jpeg':'image/jpeg','.gif':'image/gif','.mp4':'video/mp4','.svg':'image/svg+xml','.woff2':'font/woff2','.woff':'font/woff','.ico':'image/x-icon'};function send(s,f){fs.readFile(f,(e,d)=>{if(e){s.statusCode=404;s.end('404')}else{s.setHeader('Content-Type',m[path.extname(f).toLowerCase()]||'application/octet-stream');s.end(d)}})}http.createServer((q,s)=>{let u=decodeURIComponent(q.url.split('?')[0]);let segs=u.split('/').filter(Boolean);let ai=segs.indexOf('assets');if(ai!==-1)return send(s,path.join(web,segs.slice(ai).join('/')));if(segs[0]==='products'||segs[0]==='data'){let f=path.join(root,u);try{if(fs.statSync(f).isFile())return send(s,f)}catch(e){}s.statusCode=404;return s.end('404')}if(u==='/')return send(s,path.join(web,'landing.html'));const PAGES={'card-benefits':'card-benefits.html','faq':'faq.html','terms':'terms.html','privacy':'privacy.html','admin':'admin.html'};let last=segs[segs.length-1]||'';if(PAGES[last])return send(s,path.join(web,PAGES[last]));let wf=path.join(web,u);try{if(fs.statSync(wf).isFile())return send(s,wf)}catch(e){}return send(s,path.join(web,'index.html'))}).listen(8765,'127.0.0.1',()=>console.log('serving on http://127.0.0.1:8765 (Vercel-accurate routing)'))
